purpose: Tool-neutral image prompt for the project-level Northern Beastfolk siege troop eight-template reference board.

shared_rules.format: single extra-tall vertical PNG production character reference board, two orderly rows of full-body or near-full-body templates plus compact equipment details, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic bone, old wood, fur, hide rope, old iron, frozen earth, blackstone snow dust, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. Do not create, draw, paint, carve, or imply any large faction emblem, wall emblem, shield emblem, banner logo, animal crest, logo mark, or decorative symbol. If faction identity appears at all, it must be a tiny physical bonewood oath knot, small rope charm, tiny tool-carved sliver, or small drum-edge tag no larger than a palm and partially obscured by rope.
must_have: All eight role templates must appear: Blackfang breach axeman, Ironhorn shield-wall soldier, White-mane snow wolf rider, Snowbadger tunnel sapper, Greyskin siege-towing troll, Snowfeather wall-climber scout, Frosthoof dream-flute ritual soldier, and Redmane overseer cavalry.
Each template must have distinct species face, body mass, height impression, role gear, and posture.
The board must read as a practical siege troop modeling sheet, not a battle poster and not a monster horde.
No readable text, no labels, no UI, no watermark.
shared_rules.negative_prompt: only four templates, missing roles, generic orc group, all bodies same shape, human face with tusks, human strongman, short human, cute animal mascot, monster horde, large wall symbol, shield emblem, painted shield symbol, banner logo, faction logo, redesigned Northern emblem, new animal crest, single wolf-head logo, single lion crest, sticker overlay, Grey Wall human army, Suming insect infantry, Qingming white wax, Bai Yi official robe, Luming noble shaman copied for all, polished fantasy plate armor, sci-fi armor, cyberpunk, modern military uniform, high-magic blue-purple aura, spell circle, oversaturated game poster, gore, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark

input_images.role: locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem reference; do not redesign, redraw, enlarge, or place as a visible shield/wall/battlefield emblem
locked symbol system reference for material language only
Northern bone, old wood, fur, hide rope, oath cord, and frost material reference

prompts.image_prompt: Create one single extra-tall vertical PNG production character reference board for the Northern Beastfolk Alliance siege troop templates from the series Severed Homeland. The board must contain all eight recognizable role templates. Low-magic eastern epic style, tactile realistic bone, old wood, fur, hide rope, old iron, frozen earth, blackstone snow dust, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference. Critical emblem rule: DO NOT redesign the Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem. Do not create, draw, paint, carve, or imply any large faction emblem, wall emblem, shield emblem, banner logo, animal crest, logo mark, or decorative symbol. Background must be plain blackstone, snow, and frozen earth with no large signs. Shields and armor must be mostly unmarked, with scratches, dents, tied rawhide, plain bone/wood construction only. If faction identity appears at all, it must be a tiny physical bonewood oath knot, small rope charm, tiny tool-carved sliver, or small drum-edge tag no larger than a palm, partially obscured by rope. Composition: one practical modeling sheet, not a battle poster and not a monster horde. Use two orderly rows of full-body or near-full-body template figures plus compact silent equipment details around the bottom. No text, no labels, no captions, no readable characters, no UI, no watermark. Every template must be visually distinct by species face, body proportions, role gear, and posture. Eight role templates to show: 1) Blackfang breach axeman: Blackfang clan lower-tier heavy infantry, upright beast-dominant body, not a human face with tusks, 2.25-2.45m, 160-220kg, shoulders almost twice human width, thick chest and back, short neck, tiger-face or boar-face warrior reference, short broad animal muzzle, black outward tusks, thick nose bridge, deep eye sockets, ears pinned back, forearms and palms like rough wooden posts, giant horn helmet, bone shard shoulder armor, hide chest guard, outer knee bone armor, bone-handled axe or battering hammer. 2) Ironhorn shield-wall soldier: lower-tier bovine heavy soldier, closer to minotaur than human strongman, 2.05-2.3m, 180-260kg, complete bull head, short blunt horns, broad wet nose, thick neck, wide ribcage, low center of gravity, short pillar legs, broad hooves or hoof-shaped heavy boots, 1.4-1.7m plain bone-and-old-iron shield, long-handled hammer, yak-hide knee guards, immovable push-resistance posture. 3) White-mane snow wolf rider: wolf-blood light cavalry, upright wolf-muzzle body, 1.85-2.05m, 80-115kg, narrow elastic shoulders and back, long wolf muzzle, upright ears, golden vertical pupils, canines, long lower legs, visible low wolf tail, grey-white mane along neck and shoulder blades, fitted leather armor, short bow, curved saber, wolf-tooth clasp, snow boot claw covers, frost wolf or snow-mane dire wolf mount in partial side view, low crouched pack-hunter riding posture. 4) Snowbadger tunnel sapper: snowbadger engineer, strongly beast-shaped, never a short human, 1.45-1.65m, 90-130kg, badger face with short muzzle, glossy black nose, small ears, thick chest and belly, wide pelvis, extremely thick forearms, claws longer than human fingers, bone shovel, blackstone wedges, under-ice breathing bladder, short hammer, hard-fur short cloak, compressed heavy machinery body. 5) Greyskin siege-towing troll: troll strongman, 2.8-3.4m, 350-600kg, much larger than the breach axeman, grey-blue thick skin, long arms past knees, hands huge enough to grip a human breastplate, old scars and lime-white stone streaks, coarse chains, timber-dragging hooks, ice-bridge wedges, giant stone bag, broad feet, slow stable posture, part of the siege machinery. 6) Snowfeather wall-climber scout: eagle or crow light infantry, bird-faced upright body, 1.75-1.95m, 55-80kg, light skeleton, narrow shoulders and back, short beak or strong bird-beak nose, glossy black bird eyes, feather crest, short forearm feathers, long narrow fingers with hook claws, grappling hook, rope, short-wing gliding cloak, light short knife, message tube, small fire pot, light fast climbable body. 7) Frosthoof dream-flute ritual soldier: shaman and guard pair in one small template group; shaman is priest caste, 1.75-1.95m, 60-85kg, higher human proportion but clear deer ears, long neck, pale deer markings, fine antler branches, deer eyes, calm slender posture; guard is 1.9-2.1m, 90-120kg, lower caste, more upright deer or elk-faced heavy guard, broader shoulders; bone flute, herb bag, ice-blue shoulder wrap, deer-pattern amulet, blood-salt pouch. 8) Redmane overseer cavalry noble: red-maned lion-blood noble cavalry, 2.05-2.25m, 130-180kg, strong chest and back, narrow waist, red mane from temples to shoulder mantle edge, golden-brown eyes, short exposed canines, blood-red war flag, long saber, bone-gold chest armor, thick leather war skirt, noble authority and upright stance, not monstrous exaggeration. Silent equipment/details at bottom with no text: plain tall bone-iron shield, bone-handled axe and hammer, short bow and curved saber, blackstone wedges and bone shovel, chains and drag hooks, grappling hook and rope, bone flute/herb bag/blood-salt pouch, long saber/flag cloth fragment, rawhide rope, dark blood oath cord, snow-mud wraps, old iron nails, material swatches for ochre grass, frozen earth grey, wind-eroded brown, dark hide, bone white, old wood, old iron, dark blood red, tiny blue survival fire, blackstone snow dust.
prompts.negative_prompt: only four templates, missing roles, generic orc group, all bodies same shape, human face with tusks, human strongman, short human, cute animal mascot, monster horde, large wall symbol, shield emblem, painted shield symbol, banner logo, faction logo, redesigned Northern emblem, new animal crest, single wolf-head logo, single lion crest, sticker overlay, Grey Wall human army, Suming insect infantry, Qingming white wax, Bai Yi official robe, Luming noble shaman copied for all, polished fantasy plate armor, sci-fi armor, cyberpunk, modern military uniform, high-magic blue-purple aura, spell circle, oversaturated game poster, gore, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark
